title: Liberia Institute of Statistics and Geo-Information Services
summary: The Liberia Institute of Statistics and Geo-Information Services (LISGIS) is an agency of the Liberian government.  It organized a census in March 2008, 24 years after the last one.
text: The Liberia Institute of Statistics and Geo-Information Services (LISGIS) is an agency of the Liberian government.  It organized a census in March 2008, 24 years after the last one.
